strings.configuration_error: You need to configure values strings.xml for use with Medable
strings.activity_environment_set_custom_url_cont: Enter a custom URL. It should finish with .medable.com (e.g. api.medable.com)"
strings.initial_config_error_unable_to_load_conf: Unable to load default config parameters from manifest.
strings.main_no_network: There is no network available on this device.\nPlease correct that and then launch again.
strings.main_no_study_text: Study not found.\nPlease contact your administrator.
strings.main_no_network_task: There is no network available on this device.\nPlease check your connection and try again.
strings.login_forgot_password_directive_text: Enter your email address below and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
strings.login_forgot_username_directive_text: Enter your email below and we\’ll attempt to send you your username.
strings.login_empty_email_text: You must enter a valid email address
strings.login_empty_username_text: You must enter a valid username
strings.login_forgot_password_success_text: We sent you a reset password email
strings.login_forgot_username_success_text: Request received \nIf we have recognize your information we have sent instructions on how to sign in
strings.login_support_screen_basic_instruction: Please contact our support department between the hours of 8am - 6pm.
strings.login_reset_password_description: Your password has been temporarily reset and we need you to create a new one.
strings.login_update_content: This version of the app needs to be updated for features to function properly.
strings.fragment_tasks_no_tasks_text: Researchers haven\'t assigned any tasks for you today.
strings.fragment_tasks_data_download_error_text: Sorry, we were unable to load your task list.
strings.fragment_resources_empty_list_text: No resources found.\nPlease contact your administrator.
strings.fragment_profile_io_error: There was an error with the new image.\nPlease try again.
strings.leave_study_final_header: Your request to leave the study has been received.
strings.consent_required_text: You must grant permission to use the camera in order to use this app.
strings.fragment_signup_error_try_again_text: There was an error with the information you submitted. Please try again.
strings.fragment_welcome_no_pdf_reader: You must first install a PDF reader app to view this document
strings.fragment_welcome_no_email_app: You must first install an email app to send this document
strings.signed_consents_no_pdf_app_available: This requires a PDF viewer app to be installed
strings.signed_consents_no_email_app_available: This requires an email app to be installed
strings.signed_consents_email_message: Hello, attached is your consent for %1$s
strings.consent_complete_text: Thank you for signing the consent document. We\'ve generated a signed version that was uploaded to the Medable cloud. You can review it here or later in your Profile.
strings.consent_complete_not_available: The consent document is not yet available, please try again in a few seconds
strings.leave_study_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to leave this study?
strings.invalid_environment: This Environment URL is not valid.
strings.fragment_verification_pin_length_error: Please enter a %1$s digits invite code.
strings.fragment_verification_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
strings.fragment_verification_email_pin_not_veri: Unable to validate email/invite code combination.
strings.logout_confirmation: Are you sure you want to sign out?
strings.logout_with_call_ongoing_confirmation_ti: A call is ongoing. Log out will stop it. Are you sure?
strings.logout_with_call_ongoing_confirmation_po: Yes, Stop the call and logout.
strings.leave_study_final_statement: A researcher will contact you to process your request.\n\nPlease note that in the meantime you will still be enrolled in the study.
strings.confirm_sign_in_dialog_message: If you previously created an account, you can sign in instead.
strings.fragment_incoming_call_text: Your virtual visit is starting now!
strings.notifications_not_enable_content: Please turn on your notifications so you don\'t miss any calls
strings.end_call_dialog_content: Are you sure you want to end this visit?
strings.error_event_content: Something went wrong while trying to start your visit. Please wait until your doctor calls you again.
strings.missed_call_event_content: You have missed your Virtual Visit
strings.televisit_call_reconnecting_notification: Your Virtual Visit was lost. Trying to reconnect…
strings.televisit_call_ended_by_connectivity_not: Your Virtual Visit was ended due to connection problems.
strings.login_fingerprint_password_error: We couldn\'t retrieve your password, Please enter your password again.
strings.create_account_body: Please enter the invite code you\'ve received from your site to continue.
strings.create_account_resend_invite_code_body: Enter your email below. If the email is registered, you will receive your invite code shortly.
strings.create_account_resend_invite_error_body: Please double check your email and try again. If you\'re still having trouble, reach out to your site for support.
strings.create_account_resend_invite_success_bod: Please check your email for your new invite code.
strings.create_account_connectivity_error_body: There is a problem with your internet connection. Please try again when you\'re back online.
strings.view_activities_dialog_content: Your virtual visit is underway! When you tap on a task, the video will be hidden but audio will work.
strings.completion_step_body: If you wish to review or change anything, please go back before you submit.
strings.verification_warning_dialog_message: The invitation code is no longer valid, please sign in or request a new invite code.
strings.tv2_desc: It\'s time for your televisit. Please join the waiting room and we\'ll be right with you.
strings.device_not_supported: Your device is not supported by this application.
strings.permissions_needed: Camera and Microphone permissions needed. Please allow in App Settings for additional functionality.
strings.waiting_room_message: You’re currently in the waiting room for your Televisit. Your provider has been notified and your call will start when they join.
strings.tv2_notification_tomorrow_description: You have a televisit scheduled tomorrow
strings.codec_title: Set your preferred audio and video codec. Not all codecs are supported with Group rooms. The media server will fallback to OPUS or VP8 if a preferred codec is not supported.
strings.sender_bandwidth_constraints: Set sender bandwidth constraints. Zero represents the WebRTC default value which varies by codec.
strings.nopii_verification_confirm_identity: This study requires an invite to participate. If you have been invited, you have been emailed, texted or given an invite code. Please enter it below to proceed.
strings.md_numeric_step_invalid: Invalid value\nThe number must be between %1$s and %2$s
strings.md_numeric_step_below_min: Invalid value\nThe number must be greater than %1$s
strings.md_numeric_step_above_max: Invalid value\nThe number must be less than %1$s
strings.md_datetime_step_time_invalid: Please enter a date and time between %1$s and %2$s
strings.md_value_picker_step_empty: Please make a selection to continue
strings.md_location_step_empty: Please choose your location to continue
strings.md_location_step_no_permission_error: This step requires the app to have access to the device\'s location.
strings.md_location_step_no_permission_settings_: Please go to your Settings app and enable location access for this app. Once you\'ve enabled location access, you can return to the app and complete this step.
strings.md_text_choice_step_empty: Please make a selection to continue
strings.md_image_capture_step_empty: Please capture an image to continue
strings.md_camera_step_no_permission_settings_er: Please go to your Settings app and enable camera access for this app. Once you\'ve enabled camera access, you can return to the app and complete this step.
strings.md_image_capture_step_no_camera_error: Camera not found. This step cannot be completed
strings.md_camera_permission_not_granted: This step requires the app to have access to the device\'s camera.
strings.md_autocomplete_step_restricted: Please select an option from the list
strings.md_step_body_text_not_valid: There is a problem with the text you entered
strings.md_text_step_invalid_mobile: The mobile number you entered is not valid
strings.md_boolean_step_not_valid: Please make a selection to continue
strings.md_email_step_empty: Please enter a valid email address to continue
strings.md_barcode_scanner_step_empty: Please scan a barcode to continue
strings.md_barcode_scanner_step_no_camera_error: Camera not found. This step cannot be completed
strings.md_default_consent_reason: By agreeing you confirm that you read the information and that you wish to take part in this research study.
strings.md_gfit_permission_are_required: GoogleFit permissions are required to continue.
strings.md_webview_result_null: Got a null result, and the step is not optional
strings.md_webview_result_null_boolean: Error in Script: Expecting boolean result
strings.md_webview_result_null_numeric: Error in Script: Expecting numeric result
strings.md_webview_result_null_text: Error in Script: Expecting text result

strings.md_webview_result_not_a_boolean: The result must be true or false
strings.md_webview_html_content_required: The required medableResult function is missing
strings.md_consent_signature_instruction: Please sign using your finger on the line below.
strings.md_reviewstep_description: Please Review your response - tap to edit
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_data_gather: Learn more about how data is gathered
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_data_use: Learn more about how data is used
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_privacy: Learn more about how your privacy and identity are protected
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_welcome: Learn more about the study first
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_study_surve: Learn more about the study survey
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_time_commit: Learn more about the study\'s impact on your time
strings.md_consent_section_more_info_study_tasks: Learn more about the tasks involved
strings.md_task_cancel_text: Are you sure you want to leave this activity and discard its results?
strings.md_birth_date_too_young: You must be at least %1$s years old
strings.md_edit_step_alert_cancel_title: Do you want to stop making changes?
strings.md_edit_step_alert_cancel_content: All changes will be discarded and your original response will be used.
strings.md_edit_step_alert_step_save_title: Do you want to save your changes?
strings.md_edit_step_alert_step_save_content: Other responses may be cleared and you may be asked to submit new information.
strings.md_edit_step_alert_step_skip_title: Do you want to skip this step?
strings.md_edit_step_alert_step_skip_content: Your original response will be discarded.
strings.mtrl_picker_toggle_to_year_selection: Tap to switch to selecting a year
strings.mtrl_picker_toggle_to_day_selection: Tap to switch to selecting a day
strings.invalid_credentials: There is a problem with the information you entered. Please check and try again.
strings.device_offline_explanation: Your device must be online in order to perform this action.
strings.currently_offline_description: It looks like you\'re currently offline and we can\'t refresh the schedule. Please go online and try again.
strings.action_unavailable_when_offline: This action is unavailable when offline
strings.cant_connect_description: We can\'t connect to the server at this time. Please make sure you\'re online and try again.
strings.expired_task_dialog_text: This task is no longer available.
strings.device_permissions_message: Tap the \"Grant Permissions\" button. Then tap \"allow\" on the pop up dialogs when they appear.
strings.device_permissions_message_go_to_setting: Please go to your Settings app and grant permissions for the items listed below. Once you\'ve granted the permissions, you can return to the app and complete this step.
strings.google_permissions_message: Next, sign in to your GoogleFit account to obtain health data by Google Cloud.
strings.md_masimo_error_title: Your measurement could not be captured
strings.md_masimo_error_text: Please place the device on your finger and do not remove it until your reading is captured.
strings.md_accu_chek_error_text: Please ensure the device is turned on and in pairing mode
strings.md_bluetooth_check_text: Bluetooth must be enabled to continue. Please navigate to the Bluetooth section of your device’s Settings and enable Bluetooth.
strings.md_bluetooth_rationale_title: Location permission is required for scanning Bluetooth peripherals
strings.md_bluetooth_layout_permission_error: Location Permissions are required in order for Bluetooth to operate. Please grant Location Permissions from your device settings.
strings.md_bluetooth_layout_requires_bluetooth: Bluetooth is required. Please enable bluetooth to continue
strings.step_next_navigation_disabled_reason: This button is disabled until you\'ve scrolled down to view all of the available options.
strings.step_all_navigation_disabled_reason: These buttons are disabled until you\'ve scrolled down to view all of the available options.
strings.md_numeric_step_invalid_increment: Entered value should be in increments of %1$s
strings.study_selection_subtitle: To locate your study, please enter the study code you received from your study staff.
strings.study_selection_verification_subtitle: To setup your account, please enter the invite code you received from your study staff.
strings.study_selection_change_org_confirmation_: This will reset the currently selected study and sign in information.
strings.study_selection_code_error_msg: Please check your code and try again. If you are still having trouble please contact your study staff for support.
strings.study_history_delete_study_msg: This will permanently remove this study from your app history.
strings.time_travel_description: Adjust date and time of the app.
strings.time_travel_notification_secondary: Please tap refresh to sync the app
